perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a close-up of a rack filled with colorful, patterned clothing. It then transitions to a retail counter in a department store where several people are interacting. (2) A female creator with long dark hair, wearing a yellow-green top and a blue transparent vest, appears on screen. She picks up a box and begins to unpack items. (3) She presents various products to the camera, including patterned coasters, card holders with lanyards, and a wide selection of iPhone cases displayed on shelves. (4) The creator moves to a stack of orange boxes containing mushroom chicken soup, holding up a packet and a small sampling cup. (5) The final shots show her smiling and presenting the soup boxes in a bright, indoor commercial environment.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat and energetic pop-style background music starts immediately. A female voice begins speaking in an enthusiastic and friendly tone in Mandarin, announcing a pop-up event in Hsinchu. (2) The music continues at a steady pace as the speaker describes various products, including coasters and card holders. Background noise from the department store environment is subtly audible. (3) The vocal delivery remains high-pitched and excited as she introduces the phone cases and the mushroom chicken soup. (4) The music and vocals maintain a consistent level of energy until the end of the clip, concluding with information about the event dates.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '官網沒有的' (Not available on the official website) appears as a hook at the start. (2) Functional Text: '新竹巨城 快閃活動 3/17-3/31' (Hsinchu Big City Pop-up Event 3/17-3/31) provides event details. (3) Decorative/Hook Text: '硅藻土杯墊' (Diatomaceous earth coaster), '滑蓋硬殼卡套' (Sliding hard shell card holder), '手機殼' (Phone case), '香菇雞湯' (Mushroom chicken soup) label the products being shown. (4) Functional Text: 'iPhone14 - iPhone16' indicates product compatibility. (5) Decorative Text: 'hahababy' represents the brand name.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Product Showcase -> Highlight Item -> CTA

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 2 staff members behind the counter, and 2 customers/passers-by.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young female with long dark hair, wearing a yellow-green long-sleeved shirt under a blue transparent utility vest.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A brightly lit department store interior with wooden shelves, product displays for the brand 'hahababy', and a retail service counter.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Product Feature 1 -> Product Feature 2 -> Highlight -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote a limited-time pop-up store event for the brand 'hahababy' in Hsinchu. The video aims to attract customers by showcasing exclusive products like coasters, card holders, and a new mushroom chicken soup that are not yet available on the official website.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator is actively presenting the brand's products, mentioning exclusive availability, and providing specific event details like location and dates.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy presentation with bright, colorful text overlays and a focus on 'exclusive' or 'limited' items.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses a fast-paced montage style typical of short-form social media marketing to create a sense of urgency and excitement about a physical retail event.
